title: Broken Default Skins
description: Make the default skins as broken/missing textures. Why? Idek
body:
# Missing Skin Default – Minecraft Resource Pack

A tiny Minecraft resource pack that replaces the default **Steve (wide)** and **Alex (slim)** skins with the iconic **missing texture** (`purple & black`) pattern.

Because sometimes the default skins are just… annoying. 😌

---

## 📦 What This Pack Does

- Replaces:
  - Default **wide** model skin (Steve)
  - Default **slim** model skin (Alex)
- Uses Minecraft’s classic **missing texture** look
- Client-side only
- Lightweight & simple

---

## 🧠 Why?

Ever log in and see the default skins everywhere?

Yeah.  
Now they glow in cursed purple instead.

---

## 🛠 Installation

1. Download or clone this resource pack.
2. Place the folder or `.zip` into:
3. Open Minecraft → **Options** → **Resource Packs**
4. Enable the pack.
5. Done.

---

## 📁 Pack Purpose

This pack only modifies the default player textures — nothing else.

No blocks.  
No UI.  
No sounds.  
Just ✨missing skin energy✨.

---

## ⚠ Notes

- Works best when players are shown with fallback/default skins.
- Multiplayer compatible (only affects your client).
- If Mojang changes default skin paths in future versions, this pack may need updating.

---

## 🟪⬛ Enjoy the void.
